name: superui
description: Use when users explicitly mention SuperUI, superui, $superui, this skill, 本技能, or need frontend UI workflow: source analysis, DESIGN.md, planning, TDD implementation, and review.
skillInstructions:
SuperUI tool mapping for Kimi Code:

- Hard trigger: if the user explicitly says SuperUI, superui, $superui, this skill, 本技能, 调用这个技能, 使用这个技能, 调用 SuperUI, or 使用 SuperUI, start from the superui skill before answering.
- When SuperUI asks to invoke a skill, use Kimi Code's native Skill tool.
- When SuperUI asks to search file contents, use Grep; when it asks to find files by path or pattern, use Glob.
- When SuperUI asks to read, write, or edit files, use Read, Write, or Edit.
- When SuperUI asks to run a command, use Bash.
- When SuperUI asks to dispatch independent review or analysis agents, use Agent if available; otherwise execute the roles sequentially in the main agent.
- Always start frontend UI requests from the superui skill, then route to the relevant child skill.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend UI workflow skills for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use SuperUI whenever users explicitly ask for SuperUI/$superui/this skill, or to guide frontend UI work through analysis, DESIGN.md generation, planning, implementation, and review.
